'''Bini''' was [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Miner/Legends|miner]] who sympathized with the [[Workers]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[New Apsolon/Legends|New Apsolon]].

==Biography==
When Bini and her companions [[Yanci]] and [[Kevta]] first met [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Eritha]], they erroneously thought that they were members of their enemies the [[Absolutes]], and so attacked them. Obi-Wan was injured in the attack. When they realized that they had been mistaken, Yanci offered her medical knowledge to heal Kenobi's injured leg. Once the Padawan had been healed, he and his companions left the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] facility. Some time later the Absolutes attacked the mine, killing Bini in the process.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Death of Hope]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
